addition.item: Added GitHub-style light, dark and automatic themes.
Added syntax highlighting for markup, PHP, CSS and JavaScript.
Added accessible copy controls, language labels, line numbers, line wrapping and maximum-height settings.
Added English and Turkish language files.
Added Joomla Web Asset Manager integration.

fix.item: Preserved PHP opening tags when normalising editor-escaped nested code blocks.

change.item: Prepared the installation package, GPL notices and update metadata for JED review.
